original_question:
A bowling ball is a solid sphere with a diameter of 24 cm. To custom fit a bowling ball for each bowler, three cylindrical holes are drilled into the ball. Bowler Alex has holes drilled that are 6 cm deep and have diameters of 1.5 cm, 1.5 cm, and 2.5 cm. Assuming the three holes are right circular cylinders, find the number of cubic centimeters in the volume of the fitted bowling ball. Express your answer in terms of \(\pi\).

Present the answer in LaTex format: \boxed{Your answer}
info_removed_type: the diameter of the bowling ball
